name: John Mayberry
transactions: June 6, 1967:Drafted by theHouston Astrosin the1st round(6th pick) of the 1967 amateur draft.
December 2, 1971:Traded by theHouston AstroswithDavid Grangaard(minors) to theKansas City RoyalsforLance ClemonsandJim York.
April 4, 1978:Purchased by theToronto Blue Jaysfrom theKansas City Royals.
May 5, 1982:Traded by theToronto Blue Jaysto theNew York YankeesforJeff Reynolds(minors),Tom DoddandDave Revering.
